generation.image_prompt: Traditional mystical illustration in the style of 1900s lithography, with clean bold black ink outlines. FULL BLEED: Image content (trees, rocks, sky) MUST touch all four physical edges of the 2:3 image. ABSOLUTELY NO WHITE MARGINS, NO VINTAGE PAPER BORDERS, NO MATTED EDGES. ABSOLUTELY NO TEXT, NO LABELS, NO LETTERS, NO NUMBERS, NO CAPTIONS IN THE ARTWORK. STRICTLY ANTHROPOMORPHIC. The subject is a Taiwan leopard cat standing upright on two legs with human-like posture and proportions. It MUST wear clothing or robes. Essential markers: white spots on back of black ears, white forehead stripes, and rosette leopard cat fur patterns. NO FOUR-LEGGED ANIMAL POSTURE. A beautiful, serene anthropomorphic Taiwan leopard cat stands by a mountain pool at night. Above her, one giant bright star and seven smaller stars shine brilliantly. She pours clear water from two silver jars—one into the pool, one onto the dry mossy ground. Meaning: Inspiration, renewal of the species, and the guiding hope of conservation efforts.
generation.narrative: A beautiful, serene anthropomorphic Taiwan leopard cat stands by a mountain pool at night. Above her, one giant bright star and seven smaller stars shine brilliantly. She pours clear water from two silver jars—one into the pool, one onto the dry mossy ground. Meaning: Inspiration, renewal of the species, and the guiding hope of conservation efforts.
